Our Services

Buying a Property

We help you find the property that's right for you, anywhere in Thessaloniki.

Renting

We match you with the right rental, with clear criteria and personal guidance.

Selling Your Property

List your property with us and sell the smart way — quickly, and at the right price.

Core Services

End-to-end support at every stage — from the search to the signing.

Buying a property

We help you find the property that truly suits you and stay by your side all the way to the notarial deed.

Learn more
Renting

The right home at the right rent for you — or a reliable tenant for your property.

Learn more
Selling

The right asking price, polished marketing and negotiation in experienced hands.

Learn more
Valuation

A realistic valuation of your property's worth, based on real market data.

Learn more
Renovation

Refresh your property and increase its value, with contractors we trust.

Learn more
Property management

Lettings, maintenance, rent collection — we look after your property from end to end.

Learn more
